title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team used with Claude Code to scale: automating workflows, enabling previously uneconomical work, building bespoke tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He argues most people hit a ceiling where AI becomes more work instead of leverage.
